title: Tree Production Capital Grant: how to make a claim
body: "If you have a Tree Production Capital Grant (TPCG) agreement in place, you can use this page to learn how to make a claim for your approved capital items.  Read the how to make a claim guidance for the steps you need to follow, including completing the claim form, gathering the necessary evidence, and submitting your documents to the Forestry Commission.   All spending must be completed and claimed by 11:55pm on Friday 27 March 2026. We cannot extend this deadline or offer extensions to your funding agreement.  "
